SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.cobol

Class CobolRelativeFile

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.cobol.AbstractCobolFile
com.nib.commons.cobol.CobolRelativeFile
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.iscobol.rts.DynamicFile, com.iscobol.rts.IOConstants, com.iscobol.rts.RuntimeErrorsNumbers
public class CobolRelativeFile extends AbstractCobolFile implements com.iscobol.rts.DynamicFile, com.iscobol.rts.RuntimeErrorsNumbers
Represents a COBOL relative file. This class extends AbstractCobolFile and implements the DynamicFile and RuntimeErrorsNumbers interfaces.

  • Method Details

    • forceLineSequential

      protected boolean forceLineSequential()
      Determines whether line sequential mode should be forced for this file.
      Specified by:
      forceLineSequential in class AbstractCobolFile
      Returns:
      false, indicating that line sequential mode is not forced for this file.

    • setCurrentRecord

      public void setCurrentRecord(long l)
      Sets the current record position for the file.
      Specified by:
      setCurrentRecord in interface com.iscobol.rts.DynamicFile
      Overrides:
      setCurrentRecord in class AbstractCobolFile
      Parameters:
      l - The position of the record to set.

    • getCurrentRecord

      public long getCurrentRecord()
      Retrieves the current record position for the file.
      Specified by:
